response.global_analysis: Strict Verification: 1. Audio consists of spontaneous dialogue, not a scripted song; reference JSON correctly identified the lack of vocal music. 2. I am transcribing the spoken announcements and banter of the Hololive 1st generation members. 3. Timestamps are precisely synchronized to the start and end of each speaker's vocalizations, ensuring no early cutoffs. 4. Semantic continuity is maintained across jokes regarding their 7th anniversary and 'middle school second-year' (eighth grade) status.

subtitles.original: そして最後、アキちゃん！
subtitles.english: And finally, Aki-chan!

subtitles.original: はい、はい、はい、はい！
subtitles.english: Yes, yes, yes, yes!

subtitles.original: アキロゼの、なんと！
subtitles.english: From Akirose, guess what!

subtitles.original: 2024かな？自分の生誕祭の時にお披露目しました
subtitles.english: Was it 2024? I first performed it at my birthday celebration...

subtitles.original: ミュージカル、ブレーメンの曲がついに初配信になりました！
subtitles.english: ...and the 'Bremen' musical song is finally getting its first release!

subtitles.original: やったー！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: なります！この後、24時リリース予定なので、
subtitles.english: It is! It's scheduled for release at 24:00 tonight, so...

subtitles.original: ぜひいっぱい聴いたり、歌ってみたり
subtitles.english: ...please listen to it a lot, try singing it...

subtitles.original: 踊ってみたりして楽しんでもらえたらなと思ってます。
subtitles.english: ...or even dancing to it and just have a great time.

subtitles.original: あと、ミュージックビデオとしてね
subtitles.english: Also, as a music video...

subtitles.original: そのミュージカル部分だけ切り取ったものも上げようと思ってるので
subtitles.english: ...I'm planning to upload just the musical segment separately...

subtitles.original: アキロゼのチャンネルもぜひ見てください。
subtitles.english: ...so please check out Akirose's channel too!

subtitles.original: はい！以上、告知タイムでしたー！
subtitles.english: Alright! That's the end of the announcement time!

subtitles.original: ということでですね、7周年迎えて
subtitles.english: So, as we reach our 7th anniversary...

subtitles.original: え、8周年ですか？明日から。
subtitles.english: ...wait, is it our 8th year starting tomorrow?

subtitles.original: えー！？はやーい！
subtitles.english: Whaaat?! So fast!

subtitles.original: ということは、あのちびっこに例えると
subtitles.english: Which means, if we compare ourselves to kids...

subtitles.original: 中学2年生。
subtitles.english: ...we're second-year middle schoolers.

subtitles.original: 我々は中2！中学2年生になったー！
subtitles.english: We're eighth graders! We've become middle schoolers!

subtitles.original: 封印が解けるような。
subtitles.english: It's like a seal being broken.

subtitles.original: 眩しい！これ以上解き放たれたらまずい！
subtitles.english: So bright! It'll be bad if we're unleashed any further!

subtitles.original: どうなっちゃうぜー。
subtitles.english: What's going to happen to us?

subtitles.original: これからもノンビリやっていく一期生ではございますけども
subtitles.english: The 1st gen will keep going at our own pace, but...

subtitles.original: これからも楽しく活動していきますので
subtitles.english: ...we'll continue our activities happily...

subtitles.original: 皆様よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: ...so we look forward to your continued support!

subtitles.original: はい、では、それではですね
subtitles.english: Alright then...

subtitles.original: またそれぞれの配信でお会いしましょう。
subtitles.english: ...we'll see you all again in our respective streams.

subtitles.original: せーの、バイバーイ！
subtitles.english: Ready, set... Bye-bye!
